changelog:
v1.9.0 — Bug fixes & new features:
• Fixed sync timing: auto-sync now throttled to every 5 minutes (manual mode unaffected)
• Fixed version history restore not updating local cache
• Fixed locked note titles leaking in Shared Links tab
• Reduced top spacing above the app header for more working area
• New Trash screen with restore/permanent-delete/empty-trash
• Settings: Default sort order picker & auto-purge trash toggle
• Cleaned up deprecated icon usage
